reminder.notes:
Release v2.18.32

Replaces the in-app map picker's Google Maps view with OpenStreetMap -- Google's mobile web build kept redirecting the embedded browser to a link it couldn't load. Pan the map until the center pin marks your spot, then tap "Use this location".

ai-scanner.notes: Fixes the real cause found via v1.0.15's diagnostics: declined duplicates were older library entries whose files were already gone from disk, not a permission problem. Missing files are now labeled visibly, cleaned up instead of retried, and entries with a file that still exists get a real gallery id resolved so they use the same permission-popup delete as everything else. Adds a manual Recheck button to Find Duplicates.

twinclean.notes: Initial beta release. Exact duplicate-file finder (photos, videos, audio, docs) with SHA-256-verified matching, Smart Select, a 30-day recoverable Trash, and scheduled background scanning.
